note: Published report surface — the deterministic output is served as a self-contained page; GET the report_url to consume it.
prompt: Screen this dissimilar-metal couple for galvanic compatibility in a marine environment (MIL-STD-889 anodic index) and tell me if it needs protection.

how_to_run.step: Open @the_deckhand_bot and send: Screen this dissimilar-metal couple for galvanic compatibility in a marine environment (MIL-STD-889 anodic index) and tell me if it needs protection.
